failures.description: The agent misread or misused the ProductCatalogSearch result, selecting item_id 2243454707 at $164.46 instead of the actual cheapest item, item_id 1240311797 at $137.17.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to identify the cheapest available Electric Kettle. The correct tool call was made and returned relevant output at index 3, sorted by ascending price. The first item in the tool result is item_id 1240311797 at $137.17, which is the cheapest. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the answer as item_id 2243454707 at $164.46, which contradicts the tool output and appears to select the last/highest-priced item instead. This was not resolved later; the Evaluator incorrectly approved the same wrong answer.
